untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top pattern requires geometric trend line analysis (megaphone shape with diverging upper/lower trend lines) which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator values. Pattern identification requires multi-point historical slope comparison and spatial geometric validation not supported by allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a classical chart pattern requiring visual/geometric identification. The entry conditions specify: (1) uptrend precedent (approximated via price vs SMA), (2) higher highs and lower lows (approximated via price oscillation), and (3) megaphone-shaped trend lines (untranslatable—requires trend line slope calculations across multiple bars). Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT were replaced with trend-reversal logic. Actual pattern detection would require custom pattern recognition or trend line indicators not in the allowed set.
